title: Shipyard of Theseus
description:
Some say philosophy is the theory of thought. Some say there are no true answers, and we grow by disproving our own instincts. It's time to prove some wrong!

Assist Theseus, Greek hero and famous captain, in his quest to solve philosophy once and for all. Experience dozens of 100% serious moral dilemmas and emerge victorious! After all, it's not that complicated if you think about it. Unless, it is?

Think carefully and choose the correct answer to each dilemma. Prove your wit by laying millennia-old debates to rest. Your chosen answer is obviously the only correct one, so the game will bow to your wisdom.

Along the way, you will encounter conundrums none could anticipate, but don't worry. The powers of your rationality will prevail, no reflexes or precision aiming required! All you need is a mouse and at least one button-pressing limb.
description_short: A game about thinking about ships.
